steps.t: Leithiel has asked you to distract a swarm of bees with some honey. You should pick up the jar of honey. The honey is next to Leithiel at Bergraw in P…
You should place the honeypot a ways away from the barrel of grapes. A good spot for the honeypot can be found at Bergraw in Pinnath Gelin.
You should bring the yeast you've collected to Leithiel at her vineyard in Pinnath Gelin.
